title: SeedDirectoryTrust v1
description: Local trust registry for Seed Directory endpoints. This artifact records which user-maintained or federation-endorsed Seed Directory instances a node or deployment may query, and how much local trust weight each directory receives. It is not a global registry of true directories; it is local policy input.

directories.description: Trusted or candidate Seed Directory entries evaluated by local policy.

policy/id.description: Optional local policy identifier for operator diagnostics and future query attestations.

issued-at.description: Optional timestamp when this local trust registry was produced.

node_id.description: Node identity of the Seed Directory service.

endpoint.description: HTTP(S) endpoint of the Seed Directory API.

trust_level.description: Local trust tier assigned to this directory.

weight.description: Positive local trust weight used by future multi-directory query policies.

passport_ref.description: Optional reference to the capability passport proving the node may act as `seed-directory`.

federation_id.description: Optional federation scope for this trust entry.

policy_ref.description: Optional policy reference that explains why this directory is trusted.

enabled.description: Whether the entry participates in local discovery policy. Disabled entries may be retained for diagnostics.
